name: runpod-serverless
description: Ship FastAPI and GPU inference services to RunPod Serverless as production-grade LOAD_BALANCER endpoints with immutable image releases, FlashBoot model caching, integrity gates, red-team canaries, and drift audits.

interface.shortDescription: Deploy, debug, and audit RunPod Serverless endpoints
interface.longDescription: Use RunPod Serverless to ship FastAPI and GPU inference services through image-based immutable releases, Hugging Face FlashBoot model caching, production/staging endpoint specs, drift audits, and adversarial canary scoring.
defaultPrompt: Deploy this service to RunPod Serverless
